rules.name: run-format-lint-test-before-pr
rules.evidence:
run the following commands in that library's directory before creating a pull request:

- `make format` – run code formatters
- `make lint` – run the linter
- `make test` – execute the test suite

rules.name: no-sphinx-double-backticks
rules.evidence: Do NOT use Sphinx-style double backtick formatting (` ``code`` `). Use single backticks (`` `code` ``) for inline code references in docstrings and comments.

uncompilable: Dependency map note that changes to a library may impact all of its dependents shown in the diagram — informational awareness, not an obligation/prohibition tied to a specific tool call
Libraries overview describing what each subdirectory under libs/ contains — pure documentation, no action attached
TEST=path/to/test.py make test usage note for running a single test file — describes an optional variable, not an obligation or prohibition
